creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
During a buildworld, the compilation of ee.c produces lots of warnings of "cast from pointer to integer of different size". These are produced because NULL is used where '\0' (nul) should have been used instead. The attached patch fixes the warnings by changing NULL to '\0'; it also removes a few unneeded casts.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/src/usr.bin/ee && make
